allow: Bash(git -c user.email=daniel.marin@roweb.com -c 'user.name=Daniel Marin' commit -q -m 'Bootstrap single-node k3s cluster on Hetzner with ArgoCD GitOps *)

Bash(git -c user.email=daniel.marin@roweb.com -c 'user.name=Daniel Marin' commit -q -m 'Move all provisioning parameters to env vars with .env support *)

Bash(sed -i -e 's/`make firewall`/`mise run firewall`/g' -e 's/`make k3s`/`mise run k3s`/g' -e 's/`make kubeconfig`/`mise run kubeconfig`/g' -e 's/`make provision`/`mise run provision`/g' -e 's/`make bootstrap`/`mise run bootstrap`/g' -e 's/`make backup-sealing-key`/`mise run backup-sealing-key`/g' -e 's/\(make provision\)/\(mise run provision\)/' -e 's/\(make bootstrap\)/\(mise run bootstrap\)/' README.md platform/secrets/README.md .env.example)
Bash(sed -i 's/^echo "    make backup-sealing-key"/echo "    mise run backup-sealing-key"/' scripts/bootstrap-argocd.sh)
Bash(sed -i 's/the Makefile and scripts load it automatically/mise loads it automatically \(see mise.toml\)/' .env.example)
Bash(sed -i 's/with a dynamic IP just run `mise run firewall` whenever your IP changes./with a dynamic IP just run `mise run firewall` whenever your IP changes./' .env.example)
Bash(git -c user.email=daniel.marin@roweb.com -c 'user.name=Daniel Marin' commit -q -m 'Replace Makefile with mise: pinned toolchain + tasks *)
